name: 56qt Clear Non-Latching Storage Box with White Lid - Brightroom™
description:
Organization is made easy with the Brightroom™ 56 Quart Clear Storage Bin with lid! The clear base lets you see contents at a glance, while the snap-on lid keeps items contained. The space-efficient shape and deep recessed lids allow bins to stack securely, maximizing vertical storage space. Sort and store a variety of household items to bring order to closets, bedrooms, and more! Ideal for storing such things as blankets, towels, seasonal clothing, and games. Note: Use good judgment when storing items, don’t overload, keep heaviest bin at bottom, and don’t stack too high.
Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
